# Project & Coding Instructions

## Context
- Project: "Intro to IT" (Web development and AI-assisted tasks).
- Tone: Professional, modern, and clean.

## Web Development (HTML/CSS/JS)
- Use modern HTML5 and semantic tags.
- Use CSS3 with Flexbox or Grid for layouts. 
- Ensure all designs are responsive (mobile-friendly).
- Stick to a modern, minimalist UI style.
- Use English for all class names, IDs, variables, and comments.

## C++ Programming
- Use modern C++ standards (C++17 or newer).
- Standard library containers (`std::vector`, std::string, etc.) and algorithms are encouraged.
- Prioritize code readability, safety, and efficiency.
- Use meaningful naming conventions in English.

## General AI Behavior
- When generating code, explain the logic briefly if it's complex.
- Suggest "clean code" improvements for existing structures.
- For UI tasks, prioritize visual harmony and user experience (UX).
